scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=@novahealth/config && npm run build --workspace=@novahealth/types
scripts.build:apps: npm run build --workspace=@novahealth/api && npm run build --workspace=@novahealth/stellar-service && npm run build --workspace=@novahealth/mobile && npm run build --workspace=@novahealth/web
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
